text:
Once upon a time in a charming little village nestled between mountains, there lived a fox who had never seen snow. Winter was her favorite season. She liked to wander around in fur-lined robes made from old bearskin robes she collected.

One snowy afternoon, while cuddling by a warm fire pit she'd made herself a hole in the wall, the fox dreamed of adventures. She imagined herself sailing the seas on a ship full of fluffy clouds. She fancied herself an adventurer who saved princesses from treasure troves filled with glittering jewels.

So the next morning, she woke up feeling excited. She scuffed out her paws and went exploring. She stumbled upon a castle. Towering walls! Gardens! Doors slamming shut!

She peeked through a window and saw a princess dressed like princesses from fairy tales. The damsel was fast asleep. The fox sighed.

"Mmmph... I could never do princessy things." She thought for a moment. An idea! She dashed outside
